name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Originating Host
notes:
This Building Block identifies emails coming from a domain that does not belong to the company.

Note: The Corporate Email Domains reference set must be populated with relevant email domains.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Originating Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
when the event matches Sender Host (custom) is not N/A
when any of Sender Host (custom) are contained in any of Corporate Email Domains - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Originating Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
AND when the event matches Sender Host (custom) is not N/A
AND NOT when any of Sender Host (custom) are contained in any of Corporate Email Domains - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
